name: Linguine with Spicy Parsley Clam Sauce
directions: Saute onion and garlic in butter.
Add flour and stir well.
Add broth, salt, red, and black pepper.
Simmer for 5 minutes.
Cook linguine al dente.
Add clams and parsley to skillet.
Toss the sauce with the pasta and serve with Parmesan cheese.

similar.name: Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce
Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta

name: Baked Shrimp With Feta Cheese
directions: Preheat oven to 350*.
Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet.
Add salt, red peppers, shrimp and garlic.
Saute for 3 minutes.
Spoon this mixture into an 11 x 7 baking dish.
Pour wine in skillet.
Cook over low heat until reduced in half, about 8 minutes.
Stir in tomatoes, then pour over shrimp mixture.
Sprinkle feta cheese over shrimp/wine mixture.
Bake at 350* for 10 minutes.
Pour shrimp mixture over pasta and serve.

similar.name: Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake

name: Shrimp Cocktail
directions: Steam the Shrimp for about 5 minutes or until they turn pink.
Be careful not to overcook.
After the shrimp are steamed, allow them to cool and remove the shells, leaving the tail in place.
Refrigerate while you prepare the sauce In a small serving bowl prepare the sauce by mixing the catsup, Worcestershire sauce, horsradish, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Just prior to serving, fill a larger serving bowl with crushed ice and place the bowl of cocktail sauce in the center to chill.
Arrange sprigs of parsley and lemon around the center bowl on top of the ice to enhance the green and red color scheme.
Arrange the steamed shrimp around the edge of the larger bowl with the tails hanging over the edge of the bowl.

name: Fish & Chicken Batter
directions: Add all ingredients into a mixing bowl.
mix well.

name: Beer Battered Fish (For Fish N'chips)
directions: Sift together flour, salt, and paprika.
Stir in enough beer to make batter so it is barely thick enough to coat a spoon. Usually somewhere between one and two cans.

(It may look too thin, but you want it that way, if it's too thick, the batter will be chewy instead of light and crunchy) Set batter aside while you heat your deep-fryer or deep pan of oil to 375 degrees.  Use a candy thermometer if you need to.
Peanut oil is best but any vegetable oil will do.
Cut the cod fillets diagonally into 2 inch wide strips, and remove any pin bones from fish.
Lightly coat fish in flour and shake off excess.  This will allow batter to stick to fish.
When oil is heated, dip fish in batter, let excess drip off, then fry fillets 2 or 3 at a time until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels.
Serve with fries and tartar sauce.

name: Skewered Garlic Shrimp
directions: Combine soy sauce, pineapple chunks, pineapple juice, oil, garlic, crushed red pepper and green onions in plastic bag.  Add shrimp. Marinate at least 1 hour.  I usually let it marinate a few hours.
Place shrimp, pineapple and green onions on skewers. Grill until  pink.

name: Low Cal Shrimp Pasta
directions: Mix all ingredients except tomatoes and dressings in a large bowl.
Next add Ranch dressing and stir well, salad should look sort of dry.
Now add Italian dressing till moistened.
Finally, add tomatos and lightly toss.
I forgot to add earlier, serve chilled!
Makes approx 11 one cup servings.

similar.name: Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake
Lemony Shrimp With Capers and Pasta
Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta

name: Beer Batter for Fried Fish
directions: Dissolve 1 package dry yeast in 1/2 cup warm beer.
Add 1 cup flour, and a pinch of salt.  Stir.
Add remaining 1/2 cup beer and more as needed for "sticky run" dough.
Cover with a dish towel and let it stand in a warm place for a 1/2 hour or more.
Fold in egg white and use immediately.
Dry fish fillets with a paper towel before dipping in batter.
Fry in hot vegetable, peanut, or corn oil.
Enjoy!

name: Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta
directions: Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat.
Add in onion, garlic, red pepper flakes and oregano; saute for about 3 minutes.
Add in the chopped tomatoes with juice, clam juice (add in the clams later) and about 2 tablespoons fresh chopped parsley and anchovy paste; stir to combine, then cook covered about 20 minutes.
Uncover and simmer for another 25-30 minutes, over medium-low heat stirring occasionally until the sauce has thickened (simmer uncovered).
Add in the reserved clams and uncooked shrimp; simmer until the shrimp is just cooked through (about 3 minutes).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add in cooked pasta; toss to combine and warm.
Transfer to a large bowl and sprinkle with more chopped parsley and Parmesan cheese.

similar.name: Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake
Lemony Shrimp With Capers and Pasta
Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce

name: Fish and Chips
directions: Combine all batter ingredients in a mixing bowl.
Cut the fillets into desired sized pieces.
Dust fillets with flour.
Dip the fillets in the batter.
Fry fillets in deep fryer at 375 degrees with at least 2 inches of vegetable oil until golden brown. Don't crowd the fillets while frying.
Drain fillets on paper towels or brown paper bags from the grocery store.
Serve with french fries, tarter sauce, cocktail sauce, malt vinegar and cole slaw or cucumber salad (see Zaar recipe 211355).

similar.name: Linguine with Spicy Parsley Clam Sauce

name: Shrimp and Chips
directions: Mix all ingredients except shrimp in a mixing bowl to make batter.
Dust shrimp in flour.
Dip shrimp into batter.
Fry shrimp in deep fryer set at 375 degrees or in a skillet with 2 inches of vegetable oil, until golden brown.
Drain shrimp on paper towels or on brown grocery bags from the market.
Serve with french fries and cole slaw or creamy cucumber salad (Recipezaar recipe 211355).
Also serve with cocktail sauce and tartar sauce.

name: Shrimp Marinara With Linguine
directions: Cook linguine according to package directions. Drain and keep warm.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tbsp olive oil  in a large skillet.  Add onion and garlic. Sauté for 2 minutes,.
Add undrained tomatoes, broth, tomato paste, wine, basil, oregano and salt.
Bring to a boil.  Reduce heat to low.  simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Heat remaining 1 tbsp olive oil in a separate skillet.  Add shrimp.  Sauté 3 to 4 minutes until shrimp turns pink.
Add shrimp to sauce.  Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes or until heated through.
Serve over linguine.
Serve with Parmesan cheese if desired.

similar.name: Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce
Linguine with Spicy Parsley Clam Sauce
Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake

name: Shrimp Conchiglie
directions: Following pasta directions, cook pasta al dente.
Drain and turn out onto a platter; keep warm.
Melt butter, in a small pan over low heat.
Add basil and parsley. And heat until bubbly.
Add shrimp and sherry, just until shrimp are heated through.
Pour shrimp sauce over cooked pasta and sprimkle with salt and Parmesan cheese to taste.

similar.name: Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta
Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce

name: Ww Spicy Baked Shrimp - 3 Pts.
directions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
Coat an 11X7 inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Add lemon juice and next 5 ingredients to dish, stirring well.
Add shrimp toss well to coat.
Bake at 450 degrees for 8 minutes or until shrimp tun pink, stirring occasionally.

name: Shrimp Cocktail
directions: In small bowl, combine ketchup, chili sauce, horseradish and worcestershire sauce; mix well.
Arrange shrimp in serving tray.
Serve with sauce immedietely.

name: Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce
directions: Cook pasta according to box directions. Meanwhile --
Saute onion in margarine and olive oil.
Add wine, bouillon and basil, plus salt and pepper to taste. (You shouldn't need much salt, if any, because of the bouillon.) Simmer five minutes over medium heat.
Add tomato paste and stir until blended.
Add shrimp and cook until shrimp are done (no longer translucent), but tender.
If sauce is too thick for your liking, you can thin it down with a bit of water. (Add a little at a time till you achieve the consistency you want.).
Serve over buttered linguine (use one tablespoon) that has been lightly sprinkled with Parmesan cheese.

similar.name: Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta

name: Lemony Shrimp With Capers and Pasta
directions: cook onion and garlic till the onion is translucent in olive oil.
Add shrimp, lemon juice, butter, capers, white wine and lemon zest to pan.
Cook until shrimp is pink.
Mix cornstarch and water then add to pan to thicken sauce.
Stir till sauce is desired consistency.
Spoon over fresh, hot fettuccini.
Top with scallions and parmesan cheese.

similar.name: Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta
Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake

name: Spicy Shrimp in Garlic Sauce
directions: Place shrimp in shallow dish and toss with lime juice to coat.
Heat oil in skillet.  Add garlic and cook until tender.
Add tomatoes, picante sauce and chili powder.  Heat to a boil then cover and cook over low heat for about 10 minutes.
Add shrimp to mixture and cook about 5 minutes longer or until done.
Serve over rice.

name: Grilled Shrimp in Wine Sauce
directions: Boil water for pasta and cook according to directions on the box.
Dice the red onion and garlic.
In a pan heat up 2 tablespoons of olive oil and add onion and garlic. Saute until translucent.
In another pan heat up remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Put the shrimp in the pan and cook for about 6 minutes on medium heat.
Once the shrimp are cooked add the wine, lemon juice, and cooked onion and garlic.
Reduce for about 15 minutes on low heat.
Toss cooked pasta, shrimp, and sauce together and serve.

similar.name: Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce

name: Skillet Shrimp Casserole
directions: Heat up the bacon grease or butter in your skillet.
Finely chop onion, bell pepper, and garlic and saute in the skillet til softened.
Add in the tomatoes do not drain and let heat up.
Add in the shrimp and tabasco and let cook til the shrimp is done.
Take up and serve with rice.

similar.name: Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake

name: Easy and Healthy Shrimp and Pasta Bake
directions: cook pasta per directions and drain.
Mix in all the ingredients and pour into 13x9 baking dish.
Sprinkle with cheese and cover with foil. Bake in preheated oven at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes until heated through.

similar.name: Shrimp and Clams in Tomato Sauce With Shell Pasta
Lemony Shrimp With Capers and Pasta

name: Shrimp Boil
directions: Combine first 12 ingredients and 8 cups of water in a large pot; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer 20 minutes. Squeeze in juice from lemon; and add lemon to pot. Add hot sauce and shrimp. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until shrimp are just cooked through, about 3 minutes.
Turn off heat, add 4 cups ice cubes, and steep for 5 minutes. Remove shrimp with slotted spoon and place on a newspaper-lined baking sheet. Serve with additional hot sauce.

name: Shrimp With Linguine
directions: Boil a pot of water for the pasta.
Add the pasta and cook according to package.
While the pasta is cooking, add butter and the extra virgin olive oil in a sauce pan.
Add the shallots and garlic and sauté for about 3-4 minutes.
Season the shrimp with salt, pepper and red pepper flakes. Add the shrimp to the sauce pan and cook them for about 2-3 minutes or until pink.
Add the wine and bring to a boil.
Add the tomato puree and lower the heat to medium to low heat for about about 10 minutes. If the sauce gets too thin, add 1-2 Tablespoons of flour to thicken it up.
place the pasta on a plate, pour the sauce on top of the pasta and sprinkle the chopped parsley. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Linguine With Shrimp in Tomato White Wine Sauce
Linguine with Spicy Parsley Clam Sauce
